Home: This is the website of BokajW. Its primary function is to establish a link from my work, ideas, and creative processes to the public. By forming this link, I aim to cultivate a habit of steady intellectual and creative output, maintaining a desirable façade.
Weblog: This is a collection of my writing - essentially my blog.
Philosophy: Reflections and thoughts on particular subjects and events.
Materiality: Projects of design and architecture, and thoughts on objects and their relation to humanity and everyday life.
Status: Updates on consumption and other metrics I produce.
